checklist.item: Report scoring methods and whether direction is stable across methods
Report regulon database, download/version date, target genes, expressed gene universe, and missing targets
Provide per-sample TF scores and sample metadata used for correlations
Compare observed TF-pair correlation against an empirical TF-pair null
Define the multiple-testing family and report nominal p, empirical p, FDR where applicable, effect size, and CI
State whether repeated timepoints exist and avoid treating repeated samples as independent donors unless modeled
Report cell-type composition adjustment or explicitly state why it was unavailable
Report independent cohort, bulk-context, or cross-assay evidence when available; label missing layers as limitations
For label permutation, define the exchangeability assumption and biological null hypothesis
Provide code environment, one-command/example run, random seeds, and expected outputs
